package rulefixtures

// scenario for mixed_receiver_kinds: Methods on the same receiver type mix pointer and value receivers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: consistency; severity: contextual.
type Rule231NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario231Negative(records []Rule231NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
